summary.shape_sentence: Bullish trend day with an opening drive, mid-morning reset, lunch reclaim, and controlled afternoon continuation into a near-HOD close.

goat.note: No explicit star label visible; strongest move was the opening upside impulse from roughly 25850 to 25975.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels; bearish pivots appeared around the 10:30 morning high and final 15:55 rejection.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels; bullish behavior appeared at the open-drive launch, 11:05 defense, and 12:00 reclaim.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; implied supply around 25990-26000 was respected in the morning, then broken after lunch.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; implied demand around 25840-25870 was respected during the open and 11:00 selloff.

time_markers.10am_blue: Extended after the opening drive, consolidating near 25965-25980.
time_markers.12pm_red: Holding a higher-low base near 25890 before reclaiming upward.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon breakout already active; price holding above 26015.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bullish close near the upper extreme, with a final-bar rejection from HOD area.

tags.banks_broken: morning supply around 25990-26000 broken after lunch

takeaway: Bullish trend day with an aggressive opening drive, mid-morning shakeout, lunch higher-low reclaim, and afternoon continuation.
